name: Papercup
description: AI dubbing/translation API for video localization.

seo.title: Papercup — Localization / Translation API
seo.meta_description: Papercup: AI dubbing/translation API for video localization.

when_to_use: AI dubbing API for video content localization
Video translation pipeline for YouTube channel expansion
Synthetic voice dubbing with speaker voice cloning
Localize video courses into multiple languages via API
Media localization at scale without human voice talent

pros: AI dubbing with natural voices in many languages
API fits into video production pipelines
Human review option for broadcast-quality output
cons: Pricey per minute compared to text translation
Voice choice and emotion controls are limited
review.verdict: Useful for media companies scaling video into new markets, not the right tool for generic text localization.
review.best_for: Publishers and media companies localizing long-form video catalogs
review.not_for: Developers looking for text-only translation or TTS APIs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
